Class ChatClient

java.lang.Object
chat.app.ChatClient
public class ChatClient extends Object
Chat client logic: networking, protocol parsing, and callbacks to ChatView.

This class contains no UI state and can be reused by different frontends. Network I/O happens on a background thread; all ChatView callbacks are dispatched onto the Swing Event Dispatch Thread via SwingUtilities.invokeLater(Runnable).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ChatClient(ChatView view)
    Creates a new client bound to a ChatView implementation.

    Connects to the server but does not log in.

    Returns whether the underlying socket is connected and open.

    Attempts to log in with the given nickname.

    Sends a direct message to a single recipient.

  • Constructor Details

    • ChatClient

      public ChatClient(ChatView view)
      Creates a new client bound to a ChatView implementation.
      Parameters:
      view - callback sink for UI/frontends; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Returns whether the underlying socket is connected and open.
      Returns:
      true if connected, otherwise false

    • connect

      public void connect(String host, int port) throws IOException
      Connects to the server but does not log in.
      Parameters:
      host - server hostname or IP
      port - server TCP port
      Throws:
      IOException - if the socket cannot be opened

    • login

      public String login(String nick)
      Attempts to log in with the given nickname.
      Parameters:
      nick - nickname to reserve; leading/trailing spaces are trimmed
      Returns:
      null on success, or a human-readable error message to display

    • sendPublic

      public void sendPublic(String text)
      Sends a public message to all connected users.
      Parameters:
      text - message text; blank values are ignored

    • sendPrivate

      public void sendPrivate(String to, String text)
      Sends a direct message to a single recipient.
      Parameters:
      to - recipient nickname; must not be blank
      text - message text; blank values are ignored

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Sends a quit command and closes the connection if open. Always triggers ChatView.onDisconnected() on the EDT.
